title: Cleanspark Inc (CLSK) Q1 FY2024 Stellar Results: 165% Revenue Surge
text: Cleanspark Inc demonstrated exceptional growth in its first quarter of fiscal 2024. The bitcoin mining company reported revenue of $73.8 million, representing a 165% year-over-year increase. Most impressively, the company achieved profitability with net income of $25.9 million, a dramatic turnaround from the prior year's loss of $29.0 million. Adjusted EBITDA reached $69.1 million, reversing negative performance from the previous year's period. The company's hashrate surpassed 12.5 EH/s, with a target to reach 20 EH/s in the first half of the year. This expansion reflects Cleanspark's commitment to scaling operations. As of December 31, 2023, Cleanspark maintained a robust financial position: Total assets: $862.7 million. Stockholders equity: $810.6 million. Working capital: $139.3 million. Cash holdings: $48.5 million. Bitcoin holdings: $127.0 million. With current liabilities of $42.4 million and total liabilities of $52.2 million, the company demonstrated solid financial health ahead of anticipated industry changes.
